label: FDA-Approved CAR-T Cell Therapies
deltaNote: From 1 approved therapy (Kymriah, Aug 2017) to 7 by end of 2024

label: mRNA-4157 Melanoma Recurrence Reduction
contestNote: Phase 2b result in high-risk resected melanoma vs. pembrolizumab alone; Phase 3 confirmation pending

label: US Cancer Death Rate Decline Since 1991
source: American Cancer Society Cancer Facts & Figures 2024
deltaNote: Driven by screening, smoking cessation, and treatment advances including immunotherapy

label: Pembrolizumab FDA-Approved Indications
delta: Broadest indication portfolio in oncology history

label: ADC Oncology Approvals Since 2019
deltaNote: Includes T-DXd, sacituzumab govitecan, mirvetuximab soravtansine, loncastuximab tesirine, and others

label: Average CAR-T Therapy Cost (US)
contestNote: Manufacturers argue durable remissions justify one-time cost; payers and equity advocates dispute value for money

label: Metastatic Melanoma 5-Year Survival Rate
source: ASCO Annual Meeting data 2023; SEER Database, NCI
contestNote: Was ~18% pre-immunotherapy era; ~50% with PD-1/CTLA-4 therapy, but varies by biomarker status and line of therapy
